    "HasA": [
      "それは「サマー・ブリーズ」、「ダイアモンド・ガール」、「ゲット・クローサー」のようなヒット曲を持っています。",
      "それはメンバーのジム・シールズとダッシュ・クロフツを持っています。",
      "それはNo. 12 AC、No. 20 Popに上昇した「ハミングバード」という曲を持っています。",
      "それはNo. 21に達した「ウィ・メイ・ネヴァー・パス・ディス・ウェイ（アゲイン）」という曲を持っています。",
      "それはNo. 18に達した「ユア・ザ・ラブ」という曲を持っています。",
      "それはテレビシリーズ「ペーパー・チェイス」のデビューシーズンのテーマソングだった「ファースト・イヤーズ」という曲を持っています。",
      "それは「ワン・オン・ワン」からの「マイ・フェア・シェア」という曲を持っています。",
      "それは「フーリン・アラウンド」からの「ジーズ・モーメンツ・ネヴァー・リヴ・アゲイン」という曲を持っています。",
      "それは「デイズド・アンド・コンフューズド」からの「サマー・ブリーズ」という曲を持っています。",
      "それは「キング・オブ・カリフォルニア」からの「サマー・ブリーズ」という曲を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それはビルボード・ホット100チャートで最高6位を記録した「サマー・ブリーズ」、「ダイアモンド・ガール」、「ゲット・クローサー」というヒット曲で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはバハイ教の公然たる支持者であることで特徴づけられます。",
      "それは1972年に最高7位を記録したアルバム「サマー・ブリーズ」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはアメリカで50万枚の売上を記録しゴールド認定されたアルバム「ダイアモンド・ガール」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それは論争にもかかわらずゴールドを獲得したアルバム「アンボーン・チャイルド」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはゴールドセラーだったアルバム「アイル・プレイ・フォー・ユー」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それは2倍プラチナ認定された「グレイテスト・ヒッツ」アルバムで特徴づけられます。",
      "それは他のサウンドへの実験を取り入れたアルバム「テイキン・イット・イージー」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それはバハイ教の歴史を語るアルバム「ロート・ツリー」で特徴づけられます。",
      "それは1980年にリリースされたアルバム「ザ・ロンゲスト・ロード」で特徴づけられます。"
    ],

      "それは「ザ・ハミングバーズ」と呼ばれる音楽トリオです。"

About: It is about the American soft rock duo formed by Jim Seals and Dash Crofts.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Baháʼí Faith.
CreatedBy: It was created by Jim Seals and Dash Crofts.
CreatedIn: It was created in Los Angeles, California.
HasA: It has hits like "Summer Breeze", "Diamond Girl", and "Get Closer".
It has members Jim Seals and Dash Crofts.
It has a song "Hummingbird" that climbed to No. 12 AC, No. 20 Pop.
It has a song "We May Never Pass This Way (Again)" that peaked at No. 21.
It has a song "You're the Love" which reached No. 18.
It has a song "First Years" that was the theme song to the debut season of The Paper Chase.
It has a song "My Fair Share" from One on One.
It has a song "These Moments Never Live Again" from Foolin' Around.
It has a song "Summer Breeze" from Dazed and Confused.
It has a song "Summer Breeze" from King of California.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by its hits "Summer Breeze", "Diamond Girl", and "Get Closer", each of which peaked at No. 6 on the Billboard Hot 100 chart.
It is characterized by being outspoken advocates for the Baháʼí Faith.
It is characterized by its album Summer Breeze which peaked at No. 7 in 1972.
It is characterized by its album Diamond Girl which has been certified Gold for sales of 500,000 copies in the US.
It is characterized by its album Unborn Child which went Gold despite controversy.
It is characterized by its album I'll Play for You which was a Gold seller.
It is characterized by its Greatest Hits album which has been certified 2x Platinum.
It is characterized by its album Takin' It Easy which featured experimentation with other types of sounds.
It is characterized by its album Lote Tree which was a narrated history of the Baháʼí Faith.
It is characterized by its album The Longest Road released in 1980.
IsA: It is an American soft rock duo.
It is a charting singer-songwriter duo.
It is a musical trio called the Humming Birds.
KnownFor: It is known for its hits "Summer Breeze", "Diamond Girl", and "Get Closer".
It is known for being outspoken advocates for the Baháʼí Faith.
LocatedIn: It is located in Los Angeles, California.
It is located in Texas.
It is located in Nashville, Tennessee.
It is located in southern Florida.
It is located in Costa Rica.
It is located in the Texas Hill Country.
It is located in Ontario, California.
It is located in Van Nuys, California.
It is located in Cisco, Texas.
It is located in Sidney, Texas.
OccurredIn: It occurred in 1972.
It occurred in 1973.
It occurred in 1976.
It occurred in 1981.
It occurred in 1989.
It occurred in 1992.
It occurred in 2004.
It occurred in 1958.
It occurred in 1959.
It occurred in 1961.
UsedIn: It is used in the feature films One on One and Foolin' Around.
It is used in the television series The Paper Chase.
It is used in the film Dazed and Confused.
It is used in the film King of California.
It is used in the film Land of the Lost.
It is used in the film Vacation.
